commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=d1837c25702d1b0c21319cbae3e40b0a346c06fa)
commands.review_summary:
Adds the Xiaomi MiMo `mimo-v2.5-tts-voicedesign` model to the TTS provider, omits preset `audio.voice` for that model, and adds Xiaomi speech provider tests plus a changelog entry.

PR surface: Source +29, Tests +112, Docs +1. Total +142 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for a source-level reproduction: current main always sends `audio.voice`, while Xiaomi's voicedesign contract uses a style prompt and no preset voice field. I did not run a live Xiaomi API repro in this review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Manual review remains because the external PR needs contributor-supplied after-fix real behavior proof, and ClawSweeper should not queue repair markers while that proof gate is still unmet.

target.title: fix(xiaomi): support MiMo voicedesign TTS
target.body:
## Summary

- add Xiaomi MiMo `mimo-v2.5-tts-voicedesign` to the speech provider model list
- omit preset `audio.voice` for voicedesign requests while preserving existing preset-voice model behavior
- add tests for configured/default voicedesign style prompts and voice-note transcoding

## Verification

- `git diff --check`
- `node --check extensions/xiaomi/speech-provider.ts`
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/xiaomi/speech-provider.test.ts` *(blocked locally: missing `@vitest/mocker` in `node_modules`; `pnpm install` was attempted once and failed on registry fetches with `ERR_PNPM_META_FETCH_FAIL` for `detect-libc`)*

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: Xiaomi MiMo voicedesign TTS requests no longer send `audio.voice`, which the provider rejects for `mimo-v2.5-tts-voicedesign`.
Real environment tested: Tencent Cloud OpenClaw host using MiMo API key, before this source patch.
Exact steps or command run after this patch: local static checks and autoreview listed above; focused Vitest attempted but blocked by missing dependency.
Evidence after fix: direct MiMo API validation showed voicedesign succeeds with `audio: { format }` and fails with `audio.voice` as `audio.voice is not supported for voice design model`; patch makes OpenClaw emit the successful shape.
Observed result after fix: source now branches on exact voicedesign model id, supplies a style prompt, and omits `voice` only for voicedesign.
What was not tested: focused Vitest could not run in this checkout because local dependencies are incomplete and `pnpm install` could not fetch from npm registry.
target.author: gimingrao
